column1: DENVER HOME GYM INSTALLATION — MARKET PRICING RESEARCH
Sources: HomeAdvisor, Thumbtack Denver, Sport & Fitness Inc, Colorado Cardio, Fitness Machine Technicians.
HOME GYM BUILD COSTS — NATIONAL DATA
Home Gym Build (equipment only, no remodel)
YOUR GYM INSTALL TIERS vs MARKET
IMPORTANT CONTEXT: Pure "equipment assembly" on Thumbtack runs $75-$330 per piece. Your Warm Up & Super Set are priced above assembly-only.
BUT — you're not just assembling. You're bringing a crew, doing placement design, and handling everything. Assembly guys show up with a wrench.
The 1 Rep Max at $4,797 is a STEAL vs full home gym builds ($7K-$25K) because you include flooring, platform, wall storage, AND 5-piece assembly.
Denver competitors like Custom Garage Solutions charge $5K-$25K+ for gym builds. Sport & Fitness Inc does commercial installs at premium rates.
